title: NFR!
notes:
Gatefold sleeve with credits inside. Some copies including download code. Tracks numbered sequentially regardless of sides.
Runout parts "STERLING", "[MPO logo]®", "19" and the following six digits are stamped; the rest is etched.

A Polydor Records Recording / An Interscope Records Recording in the USA; B0030880-01.
℗ & © 2019 Lana Del Rey, under exclusive license to Universal Music Operations Limited. All rights reserved. Unauthorized copying, reproduction, hiring, lending, public performance and broadcasting prohibited. 
Made in the France.
Universal International Music B.V. Gerrit Van Der Veenlaan 4, 3743 DN, Baarn, Netherlands.

identifiers.description: On back cover near the barcode
